config.script:
import time
	self.props.style.cursor = "progress";
	self.props.style.backgroundColor = "#00000060"
	system.perspective.sendMessage("loadmqttlogs")
	time.sleep(1)
	self.props.style.cursor = "pointer";
	self.props.style.backgroundColor = "#00000020"

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	import json
	j = system.sitesync.getMQTTLogs(self.view.custom.device.devEUI)
	data = json.loads(j)
	self.custom.logData = data

config.script:
import time
	self.props.style.cursor = "progress";
	self.props.style.backgroundColor = "#00000060"
	system.perspective.print("Refreshing device communications...")
	
	system.perspective.sendMessage("loadactivitylogs")
	time.sleep(1)
	self.props.style.cursor = "pointer";
	self.props.style.backgroundColor = "#00000020"

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	import json
	j = system.sitesync.getDeviceActivity(self.view.custom.device.devEUI)	
	self.custom.logData = json.loads(j)

transforms.code:
if value:
	
		return [
	  "Details",
	  "Diagnostics",
	  "Map View",
	  "Image",
	  "Values",
	  "Downlinks", 
	  "Messages",
	  "Logs"
	]
	else:
	
		return [
			  "Details",
			  "Diagnostics",
			  "Values",
			  "Downlinks"
		]

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	fullPath = payload['fullTagPath']
	basePath = payload['tagPathBase']
	self.view.custom.device.tagPathBase = basePath
	self.view.custom.device.fullTagPath = fullPath
